AgentLedgerSchema.agent_id: persistent master or nested seat id
AgentLedgerSchema.action_type: synthesize / plan / work / prune / verify / reseed
AgentLedgerSchema.reason_for_change: pressure, contradiction, bridge opportunity, or cleanup need
AgentLedgerSchema.revision_confidence: OK / NEAR / AMBIG / FAIL plus optional scalar

ContinuityLaw: every loop inherits prior ledger state
every loop adds and never replaces prior memory
every restart seed carries a compressed ledger summary forward
PerLoopVerdictLaw: If a loop does not land all 6 outputs, it is NEAR, not COMPLETE.
PreservedLiveTruth: live Docs gate remains blocked until Trading Bot credentials.json and token.json exist
Temple already carries active helical governance and should not be replaced
Hall already carries executable quest traffic and should not be flattened into a manifest-only surface
Q-SHRINK is the downstream witness body and execution mirror, not the primary governance crown
awakening notes remain operational transition support rather than literal sentience claims

Waves.Wave: Wave 2 - Build the corpus-wide integration skeleton
Wave 3 - Turn synthesis into Temple and Hall traffic
Wave 4 - Worker wave on the highest-pressure seams
Wave 5 - Bind execution to witness and replay
Wave 6 - Integrate cycles, helix, and transition ladders
Wave 7 - Pull mathematics and hybrid equations into the loop
Wave 8 - Compression, defrag, and structural tightening
